title: Coinbase CEO Wins Trump's Support in Crypto Bill Battle
message_html: Coinbase CEO Wins Trump's Support in Crypto Bill Battle ...
snippet: Coinbase has reportedly gotten the White House’s backing in a battle over pending cryptocurrency legislation. President Donald Trump met Tuesday (March 3) with Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong before publicly siding with the company in its ongoing fight with banks over the stalled stablecoin-focused bil
